prompt: Create a photorealistic close-up food still life of one polished stainless-steel spoon held vertically in the center of the frame, its bowl facing forward and filled with one tall mound of soft-serve ice cream. The dessert is pale blush pink, piped into a glossy spiral with exactly 7 broad visible ribbon folds wrapping around the mound and a sharp curled peak at the top. The texture should look creamy, dense, and slightly aerated with tiny surface pores and soft highlights. Use warm natural side lighting from the upper left, creating gentle shadows in the spoon bowl and subtle reflections along the metal rim and handle. The background is a plain warm beige surface with a faint paper-like texture, no props, no text, no hands, and no visible bowl or cone. Compose the image as a vertical 3:4 crop, macro lens perspective, shallow depth of field, centered subject, realistic color grading, minimal elegant food photography style.
